title: anthyllis polyphylla
intro: Anthyllis polyphylla, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and reducing inflammation. Anthyllis polyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from associated symptoms.
